title: onobrychis scrobiculata
intro: Onobrychis scrobiculata, also known as Persian clover or fenugreek, is a perennial legume native to the Middle East and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. The health benefits of Onobrychis scrobiculata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or added to soups and stews, or it can also be used as a supplement in capsule or tablet form.
